summary: The user is focused on improving their car maintenance routine, seeking recommendations for car washes and discussing waxing and air conditioning service for their vehicle. They are also considering selling their old SUV and negotiating the purchase of a new Honda CR-V while looking for advice on pricing and selling a used car.
facts: The user has not waxed their car since February when they took it to the dealership for a routine maintenance check. The user took their motorcycle out of storage about a month ago. The user test-drove new cars last weekend, particularly liking the new Honda CR-V. The user plans to check Yelp for car washes and waxing places. The user is considering getting their car's air conditioning system serviced before summer. The user is researching the market value of their old SUV to sell it.
